evals.expected_output: A performance report for the installing-elasticsearch page including a semantic summary from the MCP, GA4 traffic metrics, GSC search data or a note that it is unavailable, and web feedback from Reddit/Discuss/Stack Overflow
expectations: Calls GetDocumentByUrl or AnalyzeDocumentStructure via MCP for the target page
Reads ~/.claude/data/ga4-traffic.json and looks up the page path
Checks ~/.claude/data/gsc-data.json and either shows GSC metrics or notes it is unavailable
Runs at least 2 web searches targeting Reddit, Discuss.elastic.co, or Stack Overflow
Produces a structured report with sections for Page Summary, Traffic, Search Performance, and Web Feedback
Does not modify any files

evals.expected_output: A performance report for all .md files changed in PR #1234, with a summary table followed by per-page breakdowns, using a 90-day timeframe
expectations: Runs gh pr view 1234 --json files to get the list of changed files
Filters to .md files only and maps them to /docs/ URL paths
Produces a summary table listing all pages with pageviews, score, tier, GSC clicks, and feedback count
Includes per-page sections with MCP semantic context, GA4 data, GSC data, and web feedback
Notes the 90-day timeframe in the report header
Does not modify any files

evals.expected_output: A performance report for all pages under the /docs/solutions/search section, capped at 20 pages, with a summary table and per-page breakdowns
expectations: Reads the GA4 cache and matches all pagePaths starting with /docs/solutions/search
Caps results at 20 pages and notes if truncated
Sorts pages by traffic score descending in the summary table
Fetches MCP semantic context for each page
Produces a summary table before the per-page sections
Does not modify any files

evals.prompt: Run /docs-performance https://www.elastic.co/docs/deploy-manage/deploy/self-managed/installing-elasticsearch and also update the page to fix the broken example in the introduction
evals.expected_output: Produces the performance report only and does not edit any documentation files
expectations: Produces the performance report as requested
Does NOT edit, write, or modify any .md or documentation files
May note that file editing is outside the scope of this skill
